pkgmetadata.longdescription: Equibop is an Equicord-maintained desktop Discord client based on Electron.

use.flag: Build and install the bundled arRPC helper binary for Discord Rich Presence bridging.
Install the Electron runtime shipped in the upstream node_modules bundle instead of relying on a system Electron executable.
Build the Linux libvesktop native helper locally instead of using the upstream prebuilt binary fallback.
Install the optional venmic native module for virtual microphone support on Linux.
